meaning: adj.战争的,好战的,尚武的,有战争危险的
examples: The Scythians were a fiercely warlike people.
Bellicose: Warlike in manner or temperament; pugnacious.
These latest allegations have a more sinister, warlike cast that is new to most ears.
Warlike deficits boost GDP statistics by kicking the debt can, but our economy suffers from continued mal-investment.
